name: Q'Redux
short_description: Play a Magician-Healer on a journey to rescue a mentor. Discover a world of unique Spirits & powerful Sorcery. Learn magic to Summon & Bind Daemons, change your shape, soar the skies, jump through shadows, or even control minds. Choose your own spell-style in this episodic adventure!
detailed_description:
You are an orphan. Adopted by a kind and caring healer, you are taught to run the shop. You do your best to help out - learning and becoming a true apprentice - when one day tragedy strikes! And you are forced to run the business yourself...

Something has happened to that healer now, but can you uncover the truth?

This is the Chapter 1: Prologue ============

  • Begin your study of the occult
  • Explore the main mission
  • Face 1 of 3 different sorcerous battle arenas sampling powerful, elemental sorcery
  • Uncover a few miss-able side-quests, cutscenes and easter eggs
  • Offer direct feedback to influence the next chapter of sorcery

Call Spirit Magic


Aid the spirits & gain unique spells and sorceries!

Commune with entities


Request help, or incur the wrath of mysterious entities on your journey

Mix Remedies


Create mystic remedies through an interactive process. Sell, keep, or barter?

Unlock Fate


Explore the mysteries of the Spirit World

About the Story ============

This project is an episodic Action-RPG where you play the adopted grandson of a healer woman.
She succumbs to a mysterious illness, leaving it up to you to find a way to help her.
Run her apothecary and unravel the source of her malady.
On this journey you'll befriend powerful spirits and learn incredible sorceries by calling upon them.

Can you save her?
